subject: Fw: Al Houara Project Morocco ( Sotheby's Realty)
body:
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld

-----Original Message-----
From: "dounia" <dounia.doughan@sothebysrealty.com>

Date: Sun, 7 Oct 2007 12:04:05 
To:<nadja2102@yahoo.com>
Subject: Al Houara Project Morocco ( Sotheby's Realty)


  
  
 
Dear Nadia                                            
  
  
We are delighted that you have expressed an interest in the 5-star Al Houara Resort in Tangier, Morocco. 
  
Al Houara is a new project 20 minutes from Tangier and includes: 
·          2.5 km coastline of pristine beach 
·          3 luxurious hotels 
·          18 hole Golf Course 
·          Equestrian Club 
·          Moroccan spa 
·          Traditional Kasbah 
·          Conference centre 
·          Beach club 
  
We offer two purchase options:  Private Use or a combination of Personal Use, Rental and Exchange ("PURE"). Where the Private Use option is for people who desires to own their very own residential or holiday home, the PURE option are for investors who looks for a mix rental investment income managed by an international property management company and flexible personal use of their own unit or hundreds of luxury resort properties across the world. 
  
Let me give you first a quick idea about our partners to know more about our company and our credibility, 
  
Qatari Diar Real Estate Investment Company launched in 2005 has became the world’s premier real estate investment  company, development pipeline of 41 projects Morocco, Qatar, Oman, Egypt, Syria & Sychelles. 
  
Whyndham Worldwide Its one of the world’s largest hospitality companies across six continents offering aboard suite of products & services to leisure & business travelers, 3.5 $ billion net revenues in 2006 
  
Sotheby’s international realty founded on 1976, global access, 255+ years of reputation, connoisseurs of life, simplicity & elegance. 
  
And now I will also let you know more about the difference between the Private and the PURE use I would be happy to advice and help you to find the right property that suites your needs.    
  
 Al Houara villas lie along stretching arcs anchored by enchanting palaces, all benefiting from unobstructed panoramic views of the Atlantic Ocean and enjoy direct access to a pristine 2.5 kilometer beach. 
The beach apartments are situated in the most distinctive beachfront location of the Al-Houara resort, all apartments’ benefits from unique panoramic views of the spectacular beachfront and Atlantic Ocean. 
  
Diar Club – Luxurious lifestyles: 
All residences in Al-Houara come affiliated to a distinctive and exclusive private members club, the diar club, Membership with Diar Club brings an array of services and facilities exclusively to owners of Qatari Diar’s luxury real estate communities around the world. 
  
PURE use: 
 For investor members your villa or apartment will be maintained to the finest detail from the highest quality furnishings sourced by the Diar –club to hospitality services such as cleaning, linen change, and pick-up and drop-off service from / to tangier Airport when you choose to visit. 
  
Private use: 
For Diar club ‘’ Private use’’ members there is the option for light Diar club membership. 
Members will access to concierge and local resort benefits. 
  
  
For more information please do not hesitate to contact me anytime. 
  
Warm Regards, 
 <BLOCKED::http://www.qatarsothebysrealty.com/> 
Dounia Doughan 
Sales Executive 
Dounia.Doughan@Sothebysrealty.com <mailto:Dounia.Doughan@Sothebysrealty.com> 
  
Qatar Sotheby’s International Realty 
Lusail Office 
PO Box 10397 
Doha, Qatar 
t +974.490.6001 f +974.490.6002 m +974.581.5240
